title: Intern Software Engineer
highlights: Owned the frontend UI development and built a comprehensive blog module using Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB, leveraging Mongoose schemas for secure data modeling and integrating external APIs.
Participated in biweekly sprint meetings and integrated user feedback to continuously iterate, refine, and deploy new platform features.
Conducted manual testing and collaborated with the team to validate database schemas, ensuring data integrity and strict alignment with backend API expectations.
Collaborated in an Agile environment to author technical documentation and facilitate system handovers, ensuring seamless integration of modules into the parent infrastructure.
